title: nervilia taiwaniana var. ratis
intro: Nervilia taiwaniana var. ratis, also known as the Taiwanese Nervilia, is a type of orchid native to Taiwan and is classified as a terrestrial orchid. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Nervilia taiwaniana var. ratis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be consumed fresh or dried to reap its medicinal benefits.
